nasb.text: But turned back and acted treacherously like their fathers; They turned aside like a treacherous bow.

esv.text: but turned away and acted treacherously like their fathers; they twisted like a deceitful bow.

cnv.text: 他們背信不忠，像他們的列祖一樣； 他們改變了，如同不可靠的弓。

ccb.text: 他们跟祖先一样背信弃义， 像断弓一样毫不可靠。

csbs.text: 他们退缩、背信，如同他们的祖先； 他们扭曲，如同松弛的弓。
